studies.title: Effect of different gait conditions on cognitive performance and cortical activity in healthy older adults

_verification.reason: The study focuses on the effects of different gait conditions on cognitive performance and cortical activity in healthy older adults, involving barefoot and Leguano barefoot shoe groups. It does not mention the reSET product, Pear Therapeutics, or any digital therapeutic intervention related to Substance Use Disorder.
